name: Blueberry Boy Bait
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together flour, sugar, and butter. Reserve three-quarters of this mixture for topping.
2. To the remaining mixture, add salt, baking powder, milk, and egg yolks. Blend well.
3. Beat egg whites until firm; fold into batter and pour into a 9×11 baking pan.
4. Sprinkle blueberries over top, then sprinkle the reserved flour/sugar/butter mixture.
5. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 40-50 minutes.
